info.name: Doctor Backend API
info.description: Healthcare Medical Scribe — transcribe doctor-patient audio and deliver summaries via WhatsApp.

request.description: Simple health-check endpoint to verify the server is running.
Upload an audio file of a doctor-patient conversation. The server transcribes it (Groq Whisper) and extracts a structured medical summary (GPT-4o).

formdata.description: Audio file (wav, mp3, mp4, webm, ogg, flac, m4a). Max 20 MB.

response.name: 200 — Summary Extracted
400 — No Audio File
415 — Unsupported Format

request.description: Send a medical summary to a patient or doctor via WhatsApp using Twilio.

response.name: 400 — Missing Phone Number
400 — Invalid Summary
